name: monosashi-eval-skill-runtime
description: Runtime for the monosashi-eval Agent Skill. Deterministic tools for inventory, track selection, and score aggregation against the v3 Monosashi rubric.
//dependencies: Zero runtime dependencies by design: the TOON codec is vendored into scripts/toon-vendor.mjs at build time, so the shipped bundle runs `node scripts/*.mjs` with no npm install and no node_modules. See package-meta/monosashi/reproducibility.md (operational) and package-meta/monosashi/dependencies.md (supply-chain security).
